recommendations.title: Once in a Lifetime
recommendations.overview: At Léon Blum High School in Créteil, France, a history teacher decides to have her weakest 10th grade class participate in a national history competition.

recommendations.title: Acrimony
recommendations.overview: Faithful wife Melinda, who is tired of standing by her devious husband Robert, is enraged when it becomes clear she has been betrayed. That's when she lost it, and now she cannot let it go.

recommendations.title: Dirty Work
recommendations.overview: Unemployed and recently dumped, Mitch and his buddy Sam start a revenge-for-hire business to raise the $50,000 that Sam's father needs to get a heart transplant.

recommendations.title: Drishyam 2
recommendations.overview: 7 years after the case related to Vijay Salgaonkar and his family was closed, a series of unexpected events bring truth to light that threatens to change everything for the Salgaonkars. Can Vijay save his family this time?

recommendations.title: Rocket Singh: Salesman of the Year
recommendations.overview: Rocket Singh: Salesman of the Year is the sometimes thoughtless, sometimes thoughtful story of a fresh graduate trying to find a balance between the maddening demands of the 'professional' way, and the way of his heart - and stumbling upon a crazy wa

recommendations.title: Violet & Daisy
recommendations.overview: Two teenage assassins accept what they think will be a quick-and-easy job, until an unexpected target throws them off their plan.

recommendations.title: The Music Box
recommendations.overview: The Laurel & Hardy Moving Co. have a challenging job on their hands (and backs): hauling a player piano up a monumental flight of stairs to Prof. von Schwarzenhoffen's house. Their task is complicated by a sassy nursemaid and, unbeknownst to them, th

recommendations.title: Wildflower
recommendations.overview: The story of Bea Johnson from birth to graduation as she navigates life with an intellectually disabled parent and an extended family who can't quite agree on the best way to help.

recommendations.title: Seduced and Abandoned
recommendations.overview: The film presents the tale of Agnese Ascalone, daughter of prominent miner Vincenzo Ascalone, and takes place in a small town in Sicily. Agnese is seduced by her sister Matilde's fiancé, and has a tryst with him for which she confesses and tries to r

recommendations.title: Kid Auto Races at Venice
recommendations.overview: The Tramp interferes with the celebration of several kid auto races in Venice, California (Junior Vanderbilt Cup Race, January 10 and 11, 1914), standing himself in the way of the cameraman who is filming the event.
